intent_tree: {"Find or access an article on WeChat": {"Access an article using a direct link/URL": {"Extract direct link from WeChat app": {}, "Validate and use the extracted link programmatically": {"Bypass login requirement for accessing WeChat articles": {"Use session cookies to authenticate requests": {}, "Emulate WeChat client behavior to avoid security checks": {}}, "Identify the start of the article content on the page": {"Search for prominent text blocks in the HTML structure": {}, "Handle dynamic content loading and encrypted text blobs": {}}, "Extract and save specific article components": {"Separate main title, subtitles (H2), and sub-subtitles (H3) from article content": {"Extract main title from the HTML structure": {}, "Extract H2 subtitles from the HTML structure": {}, "Extract H3 sub-subtitles from the HTML structure": {}}, "Save extracted article data to a local file": {"Validate extracted components before saving": {}, "Generate a structured output file with clean formatting": {}, "Store the file in a user-accessible location": {}}}}}, "Search for an article using keywords or account names": {}, "Access an article from an official account (公众号)": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "Share the direct link to a WeChat contact or use 'Share to WeChat' option in browser"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "Open the shared link within WeChat’s in-app browser"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "Use WeChat’s search bar to find articles by keywords, titles, or official account names"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "Browse
